response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and leadership in open-source projects, but lacks the required depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. His experience aligns more with web/mobile development and DevOps tooling rather than the core technical leadership needs of this role.
strengths: Proven technical leadership in open-source projects and mentoring (e.g., workshops, talks).
Diverse experience with distributed systems, real-time data processing, and DevOps practices.
Strong problem-solving skills across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS).
concerns: Limited explicit experience with C++ (required 8 years; resume shows only ~1 year at National Instruments).
Cloud architecture experience appears secondary to full-stack/web development.
No clear evidence of leading large-scale cloud compute platforms or teams in a technical leadership role.
